name: Privacy & Terms Generator
description_en: Generate privacy policies and terms of service covering Korea's PIPA, EU GDPR, and US CCPA/CPRA via an interview-driven, four-variant skill package.
description_zh: 通过问答式的四变体技能包,生成覆盖韩国 PIPA、欧盟 GDPR、美国 CCPA/CPRA 的隐私政策与服务条款。
long_en: A v4.0 dispatcher presents privacy-kr / privacy-eu / privacy-us / privacy-global as a numbered menu and jumps straight into the chosen interview to draft compliant documents.
long_zh: v4.0 调度入口以编号菜单提供 privacy-kr / privacy-eu / privacy-us / privacy-global,选定后直接进入对应问答,起草合规文档。
sec_note_en: Produces draft legal text, not legal advice; have a qualified lawyer review before publishing.
sec_note_zh: 产出的是法律文本草稿而非法律意见;发布前请由合格律师审阅。
